ullola a. Violently moving, excessively tremulous; ˚skhalita  Māl. 5. 3 ; ˚kallola  K. 302  high or surging;  Mv. 5. 2 ; lola˚ violently agitated or exercised;  U. 3. 36. 
— laḥ A large wave or surge.
